shared_properties: Projectile sheet fits inside 72x72 px per frame and keeps a crisp combat silhouette with one bright core and one readable trail direction.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while elemental flame colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
The effect is authored for transparent background compositing above the duel lane and below UI overlays.
differences: Six frames animate a compact fire orb with an orange core, ember shell, and short backward tail indicating travel toward the player.
The orb uses circular motion rather than a bolt silhouette so it contrasts against thunder and reflected spells.
Tail flicker accelerates on later frames to support the faster visual cadence of incoming attacks.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load projectile_fire_orb.png during Loading and build a 3x2 TextureAtlasLayout for the incoming projectile entity.
runtime_notes: Animate at 12 FPS while translation moves from enemy spawn to player reflect line.
Keep the authored trail aligned to the negative x direction so the projectile reads correctly without runtime rotation.
Place the sprite on a layer above world props and below the forecast icons plus HUD panels.

context.usage: Spawned from the enemy wand tip and moved across the duel lane toward the player reflect line.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 216x144 px for six 72x72 frames with no frame gutter.
The projectile reads as fire from silhouette and color alone at 50% preview scale.
The tail consistently points opposite the travel direction in every frame.
